invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破2950（近期低点支撑）或融资费率Z-Score回升至-50%以上（空头压力显著缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 2950 (recent low support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above -50% (short pressure significantly eases).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.122（基于ATR支撑）或融资费率Z-Score升至90%以上（轧多风险加剧），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.122 (based on ATR support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above 90% (long squeeze risk intensifies).
